# tests/fixtures

Test fixture files for integration tests.

## Responsibility Table

| File | Responsibility |
|------|----------------|
| `plain_feed.xml` | Sample RSS feed with 10 entries for frame query tests. |
| `updated_one_frame.xml` | Same feed with one entry updated; used for frame update tests. |
| `test_config.toml` | Minimal subscription config pointing to a feed URL. |
